ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the instrument (e.g., AAL, AAPL) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instrument (e.g., American Airlines Group, Apple) */,
  "contract_size" INTEGER /* Contract size of the instrument */,
  "tick_size" REAL /* Tick size of the instrument */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the instrument (e.g., USD) */,
  "margin" REAL /* Margin requirement for the instrument */,
  "swap_long" REAL /* Swap rate for long positions */,
  "swap_short" REAL /* Swap rate for short positions */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the instrument (e.g., technology, finance, healthcare) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the instrument (e.g., software, banking, pharmaceuticals) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the instrument was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the instrument's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading platform (e.g., MT4, MT5) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the trading platform was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the trading platform's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_platforms" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the instrument-platform mapping was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the instrument-platform mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id", "platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the client */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the client */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the client */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the client was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the client's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who owns the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., demo, live) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number */,
  "account_status_description" TEXT /* Description of the account status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the account was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the account's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account that made the trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the trade */,
  "entry_price" REAL /* Entry price of the trade */,
  "exit_price" REAL /* Exit price of the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "entry_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the trade was entered */,
  "exit_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the trade was exited */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss made from the trade */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the trade was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the trade's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being traded */,
  "market_date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "bid" REAL /* Current bid price */,
  "ask" REAL /* Current ask price */,
  "high" REAL /* High price of the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Low price of the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the instrument */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the market data was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the market data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., trader, broker, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user's email is verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being granted the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view trades, manage accounts) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
